items.name_en: Chanel 1 🌐 24C Double Small Gold Ball AS2615 ♨️ Exclusive queue entry to see the season's popular mini drawstring bag. I'll write a comparison 🌟 Size: Almost the same, both super practical sizes! Can fit phone, keys, card holder, makeup bag, etc. Super practical! The Double Gold Ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is similar.
items.name_cn:
Chanel 1 🌐 24C Double Small Gold Ball AS2615 ♨️ Exclusive queue entry to see the season's popular mini drawstring bag. I'll write a comparison 🌟 Size: Almost the same, both super practical sizes! Can fit phone, keys, card holder, makeup bag, etc. Super practical! The Double Gold Ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is similar.
🌟 Leather: Both are cowhide, durable, but the hand feel is completely different. The previous Cat Eye season version is softer (my favorite texture), more casual. I always feel Chanel should be this kind of lazy, casual, exquisite Double Gold Ball. The new one is stiffer, the leather is slightly more glossy, and the side looks more like a Le Boy. Square shape, because this one is relatively stiff, so even though it's thicker than the season version, the actual capacity is similar.
🌟 Chain: The Double Gold Ball chain is slightly thinner, probably for easier pulling. Length is more adjustable! Size: 12×19×8cm

items.name_cn:
Chanel 2020 Atelier
Size: 22*13.5*13.5cm
The 20a Atelier series features a birdcage design that is stunning in person, a true work of art. Inspired by the classical birdcage in Coco Chanel's apartment, this golden metal birdcage is adorned with sparkling rhinestones and French coins. A pair of goldfinches perches on the door frame, exuding a luxurious style and exquisite craftsmanship. Highly collectible.

items.name_cn:
CHANEL 22 Bag Medium Beige💕
Smooth glossy calfskin with clear leather creases
Aged metal, 3D Logo, classic black and gold color scheme!
Top drawstring double chain design connects the lower single chain with double C Logo, with a small 'lug' on the bottom left and right fixed with a Logo 'rivet', inside there is a zip pocket and a key chain for keys and small items...combining simplicity and comfort to pack your entire spring🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm

CHANEL 22 Bag Medium Olive Green
True pure A (White Tag) Grade A calfskin👍
Fine and lustrous leather, soft and wear-resistant at the same time
Simple appearance hides many designer's high-end designs, hollowed-out Chanel logo coins, small embellishments that elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of vintage sentiment, a loose and lazy feel! 🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23 Autumn/Winter Camellia CF
Size: 20cm Full Set
The 23 Autumn/Winter runway collection centers on the Camellia, one of the brand's classic elements. The various postures of the camellia are pushed to the extreme this season. There are complex flower beds formed by sequin embroidery stacking, as well as camellias embellished on the handbag. Even the small polka dots on the tweed and the light feather decorations appear to be camellias.

specs.rawTitle:
Chanel 23 Autumn/Winter Camellia CF
Size: 20cm Full Set
The 23 Autumn/Winter runway collection centers on the Camellia, one of the brand's classic elements. The various postures of the camellia are pushed to the extreme this season. There are complex flower beds formed by sequin embroidery stacking, as well as camellias embellished on the handbag. Even the small polka dots on the tweed and the light feather decorations appear to be camellias.

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23A Atelier Full Diamond CF
Size: 20(cm)
Collector's crystal flap bag
This is the most beautiful pearl CF of the season ✔️
Velvet surface inlaid with many crystal pearls of various sizes ⚪️
Plus sparkling crystal sequins, bling✨bling, making it exceptionally dazzling 👀
Mini double C logo inlaid in the pearl quilted pattern, truly the finishing touch 🐲
Instantly elevates the entire bag's noble quality! With the vintage woven metal chain strap, it is small and exquisite ☑️
Uses original fabric and hardware, 1:1 restored to the look of a ZP
Multiple carrying styles: can be worn as a backpack, shoulder bag, or handbag. Suitable for any height, easy to carry 〰️

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23p Basket
Size: 11x13x12cm
I really love Chanel's new 23C series
New small leather picnic basket handbag makeup bag
Full of design sense, the shape is oval
Metal handle uses a cross design
The bag can be opened from both sides, Chanel's design is really thoughtful
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, capacity is very OK
Black is very versatile, high-end mysterious atmosphere
A bag you can confidently buy!
Really a great deal!
Don't miss out if you like it!

items.name_cn:
Chanel 23p Square
Size: 12.5x16x4.5(cm)
23p Enamel Heart Square is amazing. This is a soft, delicate lambskin little cutie. The look is especially beautiful. Pink two-tone hearts, double C logo, and gem-shaped enamel decorations adorn the bag strap. ~ The combination of the enamel clasp and strap makes the Square adaptable to a wider range of styles. Even a plain shirt can make the whole outfit look striking. It is indeed a dream item for many sisters.
Style No. AS3782

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24A Bowling Bag Large Black
Purchased from the counter for 55,500 RMB
For those who love large bags, look here 👀👀. It has a very high usage rate. It is not only suitable for travel but also very practical for daily wear 🫡. It is a very capacious style I like, and the capacity meets all my needs.
Hardware: Thick 24K vintage gold plating
Leather: Original factory authentic wrinkled calfskin
Size: 28*44*15.5cm
Model: AS4812

items.name_en: Chanel 24A Cloud Bag Black, limited stock available
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24A Cloud Bag Black, limited stock available
Every piece from the Haute Couture Atelier is truly beautiful and practical. This Cloud Bag is simply the 'Bag King'—versatile and huge capacity ✨✨. The bag body is made of lambskin, and the chain length is just right for shoulder carrying. It can also be worn directly as an evening bag. The soft leather makes it very casual 🫶🫶. The turnlock works very smoothly, easy to open and close with one hand. Simply too easy to carry and worth getting~ (23×15×8cm)
